title: selaginella quadrifaria
intro: Selaginella quadrifaria, also known as the four-leaf spike moss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Selaginella quadrifaria include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
